title: Eva joke thread
wikitext:
[]: Eva joke thread.             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:54 pm Are there any eva related jokes? I know we have memes, but do we have jokes for eva? If so tell them.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:56 pm So a spy, an alcoholic, and a scientist walk into a bar and the bartender asks, "What is this, a joke?"

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:57 pm Uncle Kaji? Do you ever get that feeling... deep down... that you gotta have something, but you don't know what it is?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 17, 2011 9:59 pm esselfortium wrote: So a spy, an alcoholic, and a scientist walk into a bar and the bartender asks, "What is this, a joke?"

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jan 17, 2011 10:06 pm supershinjiasukashipper wrote: @Username: That was too obscure.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 17, 2011 10:11 pm Ornette wrote: Haven't most people seen ReDeath?

[]:             Quote Post by Combs » Mon Jan 17, 2011 11:11 pm What did the Norse god Thor say to Ramiel upon coming to Japan? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Mon Jan 17, 2011 11:13 pm I still luled a little.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jan 18, 2011 8:38 am Find a punchline time: How many Eva Units does it take to screw in a Lightbulb?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue Jan 18, 2011 10:58 am Jayfive wrote: Find a punchline time: How many Eva Units does it take to screw in a Lightbulb?

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Wed Jan 19, 2011 5:48 pm Thats a good one.

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:18 pm Q. Where do Angels grow their food? A. They harvest it from the AT FIELD! Q. What musical instrument do Angels play? A. the S2 Organ

[]:             Quote Post by bigbadtyrant » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:33 pm ^ Now those are some good ones, they made me chuckle

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:42 pm Gamer: Dude this a totally awesome game haha! *he goes to a spot he is lost in* Gamer: WTF happened? *pauses game to see mission text* Game Text: Sorry, but you can (not) advance. Gamer: FFFFFFFFUUUUUUUUUUUUU!

[]:             Quote Post by SenorSquiid » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:44 pm Q. Why does Gendo think he can stand up against the scifi jew cult, SEELE? A. He's got a lot of NERV. I better stop before someone gets hurt.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:50 pm "Evangelion had a good ending" [URL=http://img573.imageshack.us/i/dohoho.jpg/] [/URL] DOHOHOHOHOHOHOHO

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:52 pm ^

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:53 pm I don't get it, I thought it ended good.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:55 pm Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: I don't get it, I thought it ended good.

[]:             Quote Post by Oz » Wed Jan 19, 2011 6:57 pm Xard wrote: this beats my joke by thousand miles
